attempts.strategy: Pure topology: basic opens are a neighbourhood basis (isBasis_iff_nbhd.1 isBasis_basic_opens), pointwise choose D(g x) ≤ U(φ' x); isCompact_univ.elim_finite_subcover → finite Finset t; reindex via t.equivFin; span goal via iSup_basicOpen_eq_top_iff.
attempts.lean_error: Type mismatch: isBasis_iff_nbhd.mp …isBasis_basic_opens has implicit {U}{x}; binding it as a `have` then applying mismatched the expected ∀-form.
attempts.insight: isBasis_iff_nbhd's {U}{x} are IMPLICIT — do not pre-bind; apply directly to the membership proof inline.

attempts.strategy: Apply isBasis_iff_nbhd.1 inline to the membership; use rw [← hU, Opens.mem_iSup] at hxtop to get the cover index.
attempts.lean_error: rewrite failed: did not find @Membership.mem … (iSup …) — carrier shows ↥(Spec R) vs PrimeSpectrum ↑R; Opens.mem_iSup won't rw against (Spec R).Opens membership.
attempts.insight: Opens.mem_iSup must be applied via .1 (defeq-lenient), not rw, when the collection is (Spec R).Opens.

attempts.strategy: rw [← hU] only, then obtain index via Opens.mem_iSup.1 hxtop applied to the membership; finite refinement via equivFin; final span via ← iSup_basicOpen_eq_top_iff + eq_top_iff, pulling each point back through e (Equiv.symm_apply_apply).

attempts.insight: (Spec R).carrier is rfl-equal to PrimeSpectrum ↑R; PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen g is accepted directly as (Spec R).Opens. Axiom-clean.
